title: sia-autoresearch run scores
description: Contract for runs/<run-id>/score.json and manifest.json scores. All dimensions 0.00-1.00. Overall is an honest rollup, not a formula. Most runs should land below 0.80; see spec section 8 for the rubric, hard downgrade triggers, and calibration anchors in examples/runs/.

clarity.description: Optional — omit or repurpose if irrelevant for the kind; stay consistent within a repo
